infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location to show ambulance tracking and emergency services nearby.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs access to your location for emergency services and ambulance tracking.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: This app needs access to your contacts to add emergency contacts.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow LifeLink to access your location for emergency services and ambulance tracking.

plugins.contactsPermission: Allow LifeLink to access your contacts to add emergency contacts.
